chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 58- عن أب عبيدة قال: زاملت أبا جعفر (ع) إل مة، فإن إذا نزل صافحن واذا ركب صافحن ،فقلت: جعلت ‐  فداك، كأنك ترى ف هذا شيئاً؟ فقال: نَعم، إن المؤمن إذا لق أخاه فصافحه تفرقا من غير ذنب

en.muhajir-b-ali: 58. It has been reported that Abu 'Ubaydah said: I accompanied Abu Ja'far (a.s) to Makkah, and whenever he broke his journey, he shook hands with me; and when he commenced, he shook hands with me. So, I said to him, 'May I be ransomed for you! Perhaps you do this for a reason?' 'Indeed,' he replied, 'Whenever a believer meets his brother (in faith) and shakes hands with him, they are absolved of sins.'
